specs: Demonstrate hex's hexagonal architecture enforcement with a multi-layer Rust CLI app. Every phase generates code AND tests. Domain has zero deps, ports define trait contracts, adapters implement them, composition root wires everything.

phases.name: domain
phases.description: Pure domain types + tests — zero external dependencies

tasks.name: Domain value objects + unit tests
tasks.description:
Create src/domain/mod.rs with pure value objects for a weather app. ZERO external dependencies — only std.

Types:
- pub struct Temperature { pub celsius: f64 } with pub fn to_fahrenheit(&self) -> f64 { self.celsius * 9.0 / 5.0 + 32.0 } and impl std::fmt::Display
- pub enum Condition { Sunny, Cloudy, Rainy, Snowy, Windy } with impl std::fmt::Display
- pub struct Weather { pub city: String, pub temp: Temperature, pub humidity: u8, pub condition: Condition } with impl std::fmt::Display
- pub struct DayForecast { pub date: String, pub high: Temperature, pub low: Temperature, pub condition: Condition }
- pub struct Forecast { pub city: String, pub days: Vec<DayForecast> } with impl std::fmt::Display

Tests (MANDATORY — include #[cfg(test)] mod tests):
- test_temperature_to_fahrenheit: assert Temperature { celsius: 0.0 }.to_fahrenheit() == 32.0
- test_temperature_to_fahrenheit_boiling: assert Temperature { celsius: 100.0 }.to_fahrenheit() == 212.0
- test_temperature_display: assert format!("{}", Temperature { celsius: 20.5 }) contains "20.5"
- test_condition_display: assert format!("{}", Condition::Sunny) == "Sunny"
- test_weather_display: create a Weather struct and assert Display output contains city name

Return ONLY the complete Rust source file with both types AND tests.
tasks.done_condition: rustc --edition 2021 --test src/domain/mod.rs succeeds AND tests pass

phases.name: ports
phases.description: Trait interfaces + contract tests — depend only on domain

gate.command: rustc --edition 2021 --crate-type lib src/domain/mod.rs && echo 'ports: imports validated'

tasks.name: Port traits with contract documentation
tasks.done_condition: File contains 'use crate::domain' and does NOT contain 'use crate::adapters'

phases.name: adapters
phases.description: Implementations + adapter tests — depend only on ports and domain

tasks.name: Weather adapter + CLI adapter with tests
tasks.description:
Create src/adapters/mod.rs implementing the port traits.

Use these exact imports:
use crate::domain::{Weather, Temperature, Condition, Forecast, DayForecast};
use crate::ports::{WeatherService, CliParser, CliRequest};

Implementations:
- pub struct MockWeatherService; impl WeatherService for MockWeatherService — generate deterministic mock data. Use the city name byte sum as seed: let seed: u64 = city.as_bytes().iter().map(|b| *b as u64).sum(); then temp = (seed % 35) as f64 - 5.0
- pub struct EnvCliParser; impl CliParser for EnvCliParser — parse std::env::args(). Accept: <city> [--forecast] [--fahrenheit]. Return Err with usage string if no city.

Tests (MANDATORY — include #[cfg(test)] mod tests):
- test_mock_weather_returns_data: call MockWeatherService.current("London") and assert Ok with city == "London"
- test_mock_weather_deterministic: call current("London") twice, assert same temperature
- test_mock_forecast_length: call forecast("London", 3) and assert days.len() == 3

Architecture rule: MUST NOT import from other adapters. Only crate::domain and crate::ports.

Return ONLY the complete Rust source file.
tasks.done_condition: File contains 'use crate::ports' and 'use crate::domain' and does NOT contain any other crate:: imports

phases.name: composition
phases.description: Composition root + integration test — wires adapters to ports

tasks.name: Composition root with dependency inversion
tasks.done_condition: rustc --edition 2021 src/main.rs -o weather && ./weather London produces output
